name: Dark Angel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Resift cake flour with cocoa powder, 3/4 cup sugar, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg whites on low speed until frothy (1 1/2 minutes).
4. Sprinkle cream of tartar over the egg whites.
5. Beat on medium speed until white and foamy.
6. Slowly add remaining sugar, beating for 2 to 3 minutes until soft peaks form.
7. Add one-third of the cocoa mixture and vanilla, folding gently with a rubber spatula.
8. Repeat step 7 with the remaining cocoa mixture, being careful not to overfold.
9. Pour batter into an ungreased 9 or 10-inch tube pan.
10. Bake in the lower third of the oven for about 50 to 60 minutes until the cake springs back when touched and a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from oven and invert the tube pan on a counter.
12. Let cool in the pan for about 2 hours before removing.
